{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Shyrax's disguise
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Shyrax's disguise]] is a black, generic armored uniform with a closed helmet.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10">''The Engineer'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
